startup-india-registration.label: Is your entity incorporated as a company/LLP and less than 10 years old (Yes/No + brief)?
How is your business innovative or scalable compared to existing solutions (brief)?
Do you have incorporation/registration certificate ready (Yes/No)?
Have you received any funding or plan to (Yes/No + brief)?
Do you have a website or pitch deck explaining your startup (Yes/No)?
What stage is your startup at (idea/MVP/revenue generating)?

trade-license.label: What type of business activity will be carried out at the premises?
What is the exact address of the business premises?
Is the premises owned or rented and do you have proof (Yes/No)?
Which municipal authority/area does the premises fall under?
Approximate number of employees working at the premises?
Is this a new license or renewal of an existing one (brief)?

fssai-registration.label: What type of food business are you running (home-based, small vendor, etc.)?
What is your expected annual turnover (approximate)?
Where is the food business located (home/shop address)?
What kind of food products will you handle or sell?
Do you already have any FSSAI number (Yes/No)?
Do you have owner ID proof and photo ready (Yes/No)?

fssai-license.label: What is the scale of your food business (state/national level)?
What is your current or expected annual turnover (approximate)?
Are you manufacturing, trading, or distributing food products?
Do you have a manufacturing unit or multiple locations (Yes/No + brief)?
What categories of food products are involved?
Are you upgrading from FSSAI registration to license (Yes/No)?

import-export-code.label: Do you have PAN and a current bank account in business name (Yes/No)?
Will you be importing, exporting, or both?
What type of goods/services will you import/export?
What is your registered business address?
Have you registered on DGFT portal already (Yes/No)?

udyam-registration.label: Do you have Aadhaar of proprietor/partner/director ready (Yes/No)?
Is your business manufacturing or service-based?
Approximate investment in plant & machinery or equipment?
Approximate annual turnover of the business?
Do you already have Udyog Aadhaar/MSME registration (Yes/No)?
Is PAN linked with Aadhaar for the applicant (Yes/No)?

digital-signature-certificate.label: Which type of DSC is required (Class 3, signing, etc.)?
Do you have PAN and Aadhaar for verification (Yes/No)?
Are you available for video verification (Yes/No)?
Do you have access to mobile/email linked with Aadhaar (Yes/No)?
Do you need a USB token for DSC storage (Yes/No)?

tan-registration.label: What is the type of entity applying for TAN?
Will you be deducting TDS on payments (Yes/No + brief)?
Do you have PAN of the entity ready (Yes/No)?
What is the registered address for TAN application?
Who will be the authorized signatory (name/designation)?
Have you applied for TAN earlier (Yes/No)?

pf-registration.label: How many employees are currently employed?
Approximate salary range of employees (basic details)?
Do you already have a PF registration number (Yes/No)?
When did your business start operations (approximate date)?
Do you need ongoing PF return filing support (Yes/No)?

esi-registration.label: How many employees earn below ESI threshold wages?
Is your business registered with PAN/GST (Yes/No)?
When did your business start operations?
Do you already have ESI registration (Yes/No)?
What is the approximate salary range of employees?
Do you need help with monthly ESI filings (Yes/No)?

iso-registration.label: Which ISO standard do you want (ISO 9001, 27001, etc.)?
What is your business activity for ISO scope?
Do you have process documentation already (Yes/No)?
By when do you need ISO certification?
Is this a fresh certification or renewal (brief)?

12a-registration.label: Is your entity a trust, society, or Section 8 company?
Do you have registration certificate and trust deed/MOA (Yes/No)?
What charitable activities are being carried out?
What are your main income sources (donations/grants)?
Do you maintain books of accounts (Yes/No)?

80g-registration.label: Do you already have valid 12A registration (Yes/No)?
What activities does your NGO currently perform?
Do you have financial statements ready (Yes/No)?
Have you filed ITRs and complied regularly (Yes/No)?

fcra-registration.label: In which year was your NGO registered?
Do you plan to receive foreign donations (Yes/No)?
Have you completed 3 years of active operations (Yes/No)?
Do you have an SBI FCRA designated account (Yes/No)?
Provide details of key governing members (brief)?
Have you applied or been rejected earlier (Yes/No)?

fire-license.label: What is the total area of the premises (approximate sq ft)?
Do you have fire safety equipment installed (Yes/No)?
Is the building plan approved by authorities (Yes/No)?
What is the occupancy/use of the building?
Is this a new application or renewal (brief)?

shop-act-registration.label: What type of shop or establishment are you registering?
How many employees are working at the shop?
What is the shop address with proof available (Yes/No)?
What are the working hours of the establishment?
When did the business start operations?
Is this new registration or renewal (brief)?

drug-license.label: What type of drug license is required (retail/wholesale)?
Do you have a registered pharmacist/competent person (Yes/No)?
What is the area of the premises (in sq ft)?
Do you have proper storage like refrigerator (Yes/No)?
Do you have ownership/rent agreement of premises (Yes/No)?
Is this new license or renewal (brief)?

barcode-registration.label: What is your brand name to be registered?
What type of products will use barcodes?
Do you plan to sell products internationally (Yes/No)?
Have you applied for GS1 before (Yes/No)?

bis-registration.label: Is BIS mandatory for your product (Yes/No/Not sure)?
Do you have product test reports (Yes/No)?
Have you applied for BIS earlier (Yes/No)?

apeda-registration.label: What agricultural products will you export?
Do you have IEC code already (Yes/No)?
Which countries are you targeting for export?
Do you have a processing/packaging unit (Yes/No)?
Have you registered with APEDA before (Yes/No)?

professional-tax-registration.label: In which state are you applying for professional tax?
What are the employee salary brackets (approximate)?
Do you already have PT registration (Yes/No)?
Do you need help with PT returns (Yes/No)?

rmc-registration.label: Which export promotion council applies to your business?

halal-license-certification.label: Are all ingredients Halal compliant (Yes/No/Not sure)?
Is your facility ready for inspection (Yes/No)?
Have you applied for Halal certification earlier (Yes/No)?

icegate-registration.label: Do you have IEC code already (Yes/No)?
What is your business type (importer/exporter/custom broker)?
Who will be the authorized signatory?
Do you want to link bank account for customs payments (Yes/No)?
Are you registered on DGFT portal (Yes/No)?
Do you already have ICEGATE ID (Yes/No)?

legal-entity-identifier-code.label: What type of entity is applying for LEI?
Why do you need LEI (loan, RBI compliance, etc.)?
Do you have PAN and incorporation documents (Yes/No)?
Who will be the authorized signatory?
Which bank or authority requested LEI?
Is this new LEI or renewal (brief)?

darpan-registration.label: Is your entity a trust, society, or Section 8 company?
Do you have PAN of the NGO (Yes/No)?
Provide details of key office bearers?
What activities does your NGO perform?
Do you already have Darpan ID (Yes/No)?

certificate-incumbency.label: What is the company name and country of incorporation?
Why do you need certificate of incumbency?
By when do you need the certificate?

tn-rera-registration-agents.label: Are you applying as individual or company?
Do you have prior real estate experience (Yes/No + brief)?
Do you have PAN and Aadhaar ready (Yes/No)?
Do you have any criminal record (Yes/No)?
Have you registered under RERA before (Yes/No)?
